description: Comparison of v8 original outputs with v13 Phase 3 re-run outputs

v8_results.note: 0-D PASS but was extraction-only (133 entries), not a validation check

changed_verdicts.reason: SCOPE_CHANGE: v8 checked heading hierarchy (H1->H3 level jumps, 3 errors at lines 630/795/987). v13 re-scopes to LOCK/FREEZE value verification. All LOCK values match SOT. Heading jumps are intentional formatting, not data errors.

ERROR_REDUCTION: v8 had 7 keyword-number inconsistencies. v13 reclassifies 5 as intentional version-specific values (max_tokens V1/V2, I-Series counts, V1/V2/V3 module counts). 2 genuine inconsistencies persist: DecisionSchema 18 vs 16, ResponseEnvelope 5 vs 3 in summary tables. Errors reduced from 7 to 2.

RESOLVED: Both v8 errors were script parsing issues. (1) IPC handlers '72개' header has 5 category rows summing to 72 (15+15+18+19+5). (2) MCP catalog 'V1=7개' header has 11 total rows matching 'V1=7+V2=3+V3=1=11'. v8 regex captured partial headers.

scope_changes.v8_name: HTML Comment Integrity + SOURCE_CONFLICT Body Verification

scope_changes.v13_name: Dependency Order / Header Count vs Actual Rows

structural.net_change: +2 PASS (v8: 5 PASS / 3 FAIL -> v13: 7 PASS / 1 FAIL)

changed_verdicts.reason: SCOPE_CHANGE: v8 validated API endpoints (8 part2-only IPC, 67 src-only IPC, 11 src-only RPC). v13 re-scopes to Units/Formats consistency. Different verification target.
SCOPE_CHANGE: v8 validated config keys (15 value mismatches + 2 missing sections = 17 errors). v13 re-scopes to Timeouts/Retry verification. All timeout values match SOT.
SCOPE_CHANGE: v8 detected tech stack conflicts (premature Qdrant/Neo4j/S3 references in V0/V1, 5 errors). v13 re-scopes to Test Coverage verification. All modules have test specifications.

scope_changes.v8_name: Config Key Validation + V7-1 Canonical Section Check

implementation.net_change: +3 PASS (v8: 3 PASS / 3 FAIL -> v13: 6 PASS / 0 FAIL). Note: all IMP scripts were re-scoped to different verification targets, so direct verdict comparison reflects scope change rather than PART2 content fixes.

phase0_summary.note: Improvement driven by: (1) v13 re-scoping scripts to task spec definitions, (2) v8 script parsing errors resolved (0-H), (3) reclassification of version-specific values as non-errors (0-E). Most IMP improvements reflect scope changes rather than PART2 content changes.

agent_diff.note_on_v8_counts: v8 findings are extracted from unstructured markdown conversation files with per-agent severity summaries. Counts include BLOCKER+HIGH+MEDIUM+LOW from each agent's final summary. v8 used a 4-level severity scale (BLOCKER/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW); v13 uses 3-level (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) with adversarial DISMISSED category.

by_agent.note: v8 had 3 BLOCKER (9-State naming), 8 HIGH. v13 has 3 MEDIUM + 4 LOW.
v8 had 5 HIGH (Guardrails layer count). v13 has 4 MEDIUM + 4 LOW.
v8 had 3 HIGH (SDAR state naming). v13 has 4 MEDIUM + 4 LOW.
v8 had 8 HIGH. v13 has 5 MEDIUM + 4 LOW.
v8 had 5 BLOCKER (DecisionSchema, schema counts). v13 has 2 HIGH + 3 MEDIUM + 3 LOW.
v8 had 1 BLOCKER + 6 HIGH. v13 has 1 HIGH + 4 MEDIUM + 3 LOW.
v8 had 5 HIGH. v13 has 1 HIGH + 2 MEDIUM + 4 LOW.
v8 had 2 BLOCKER + 9 HIGH. v13 has 2 MEDIUM + 4 LOW.
v8 had 1 BLOCKER + 4 HIGH. v13 has 1 MEDIUM + 5 LOW.
v8 had 1 BLOCKER + 7 HIGH. v13 has 1 MEDIUM + 4 LOW.
v8 had 1 BLOCKER (PART2 version mismatch blocking all checks). v13 has 2 MEDIUM + 4 LOW.
v8 had 2 BLOCKER + 1 HIGH (§7.x reference errors). v13 has 1 HIGH + 3 MEDIUM + 3 LOW.

resolved_from_v8.resolution: PART2 updated to use D2.0-08 canonical state names in v14+
PART2 corrected to 18 fields per D2.1-D2 FREEZE in v14+
PART2 section references corrected to match D2.0-02 actual section numbers
PART2 IPC catalog updated to match B2 canonical 72 commands
Scope change: v13 evaluates config values in context of version-specific defaults
PART2 has been updated; v13 agents now verify against current version

new_in_v13.description: CostGate threshold in V0-STEP-4 prompt uses 70/85/95 vs D2.0-07 LOCK 80/100
new_in_v13.note: Not detected by v8 agents because v8 focused on structural checks, not prompt content verification

new_in_v13.description: L4_SELF_EVOLVING autonomy level undefined in any SOT document
QoD < 0.4 storage restriction from D2.0-06 not in PART2
Matryoshka dimension conflict: PART2 256 vs PHASE_B4 512
L0 TTL composite rule defensible but CLAUDE.md 7-day value creates confusion

persistent.note: L675 not updated after v10.0.0 correction
Summary table has stale value; main body is correct
Summary table has stale value; main body is correct

persistent.finding: V2 Lead Agent Opus not stated
persistent.note: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC specifies Lead=Opus but PART2 V2 section omits this

shift_analysis.blocker_elimination: v8 had 14 BLOCKERs across agents. v13 has 0 BLOCKERs. All v8 BLOCKERs were either resolved (9-State naming, DecisionSchema, §7.x refs, version mismatch) or reclassified (schema count corrections applied in v14+).
shift_analysis.high_reduction: v8 had 61 HIGHs. v13 raw has 5 HIGHs, adjusted to 1 HIGH. Massive reduction driven by: (1) PART2 content fixes between v8 and v13, (2) v13 agents using different severity criteria (no BLOCKER tier), (3) adversarial review downgrading inflated severities.
shift_analysis.medium_compression: v8 had 68 MEDIUMs. v13 raw has 33, adjusted to 8. Many v8 MEDIUMs resolved or reclassified as LOW by v13 adversarial review.
shift_analysis.duplicate_rate: v13 adversarial found 25.9% duplicate rate across agents (22 findings in 10 clusters). v8 did not have systematic deduplication.
shift_analysis.false_positive_rate: v13 adversarial found 8.2% false positive rate. Performance benchmarks were the largest false positive cluster (2 agents reported missing, but present in §7.5.3).
shift_analysis.severity_inflation_rate: 47.5% of v13 challenged findings had severity reduced. Most MEDIUM findings downgraded to LOW.
